sentences.text: Ask Claude to explain its own work
As an app grows, you stop holding its whole shape in your head — there are features you asked for weeks ago and can't recall the details of.
You don't have to read the code to direct it.
Two kinds of questions cover most needs:
— it names the file and part.
"Walk me through how the streak resets."
— it explains its own code back to you in plain language.
